description: Channel-agnostic paid-strategy audit. Detects every connected ad platform, researches unknown ones, and produces two durable reference files per channel: a KPI map (primary KPI per strategy/slice, plus the confirmed spend threshold) and a naming key (decoder for the account's campaign/ad-set/ad names), plus an alignment-check visualization. Reads workspace-goal and spend-threshold as signals (goal defaults to ROAS; spend threshold is confirmed with the user) so every creative verdict combines spend + KPI. Installs a user.md instruction that reads both files before answering performance questions. Re-run any time to refresh — no scheduled routine.

installs.purpose: Main audit skill — channel detection, name decoding, per-channel KPI map + naming key, alignment visualization, user.md install
Pre-researched channel knowledge for Meta and TikTok. Other channels get auto-researched on first detection.
Local routing index for saved KPI maps and naming keys
Global INDEX.md routing entry for the strategy library. The skills themselves are auto-discovered, intentionally not indexed.

runtime_installs.guard: sentinel 'runneth-apps:paid-strategy:read-before-performance v2' already present; removes any older v1 block
runtime_installs.trigger: After the first successful audit for any workspace, idempotent across subsequent runs
runtime_installs.purpose: Standing instruction so future performance questions auto-read the channel's KPI map (grading each slice on its primary KPI combined with the confirmed spend threshold, overriding the workspace-goal default from the system prompt) and naming key (interpreting names the way the team does)

post_install.name: Introduce the new capability
post_install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.

changelog.notes: Trimmed to a single focused job: find the right KPIs, spend threshold, and naming breakdowns. Produces two durable reference files: a KPI map (primary KPI per strategy/slice, plus a confirmed spend threshold) and a new durable naming key (decoder for the account's campaign/ad-set/ad names). Cut testing-methodology decode, conviction-vs-experiments analysis, and the cross-channel overall-strategy.md synthesis. Cut the Friday drift+ping routine, the dedicated setup-paid-strategy-audit skill, and the per-workspace _config file (a general setup skill handles ping/config now; re-run the audit to refresh). Funnel decoding reduced to light slice grouping. Workspace-goal and spend-threshold are now read as signals (goal defaults to ROAS, so a non-ROAS value is a deliberate user signal; spend threshold is Motion's account-size default that gets confirmed with the user) instead of ignored, and every creative verdict combines spend + KPI. The KPI map keeps the filename <channel>-strategy.md for downstream continuity. user.md snippet bumped to runneth-apps:paid-strategy:read-before-performance v2, now pointing at both files with the spend-threshold rule and removing any older v1 block.
Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.

Initial release. Channel-agnostic — auto-detects Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, AppLovin, Snapchat, or any other connected ad platform. Auto-researches unknown channels and writes _channels/<channel>.md knowledge file before producing the brief. Detective-mode naming parser replaces token-vocabulary assumptions and works on structured, underscore-separated, or free-form names. user.md runtime install (runneth-apps:paid-strategy:read-before-performance v1) overrides workspace-goal and spend-threshold from system prompt. Friday drift+ping routine baked in. Pre-seeded channel knowledge for Meta and TikTok.
